footer_tagline: Centralised GBV information and support, built for South African women and girls.
footer_bottom: SafeHaven · Built for South African women and girls
hero_desc: SafeHaven brings shelters, legal guidance, and someone to talk to into one place, built for South Africa, in the languages you speak.
how_1_text: Search shelters, clinics, and legal aid offices by province and see exactly what each one offers before you go.
how_2_text: Plain-language guides explain protection orders, reporting abuse, and what South African law allows you to do.
how_3_text: Everything on this site can be closed instantly with Quick Exit, and nothing here is stored or tracked.
resource_abuse_sub: Recognise the signs of different forms of abuse
resource_map_sub: An interactive map of verified services by province
resource_rights_sub: A step-by-step guide to applying, free of charge
resource_support_sub: Hotlines and counselling services, any time of day
cta_title: You don't have to figure this out alone.
cta_desc: Everything on SafeHaven is free, confidential, and built to work even on a slow connection.
